Meet Our Founder
"I built this because I didn't have it."

Hola, I'm Bessy Martinez. I created The Latina Foundation to be the space I wish I had, a safe, powerful, and cultura-rooted community where Latinas can rise, rest, and rebuild.

Read Our Story

Designed to support you at every stage of your journey.

Entrepreneurship Program

Build your business with mentorship, tools, and a community that believes in your vision.

Leadership Circles

Peer-led circles to sharpen leadership skills, build confidence, and expand your network.

Mentorship Program

Gather, connect, and celebrate cultura with your people at local and virtual events.

Career and Leadership

Wellness and Retreats

What It Feels Like to Be Here
Real stories from the women who call this community home.

"This community changed how I see myself and what I'm capable of. I finally feel seen and celebrated."

Maria G., Entrepreneur

"For the first time I had a room full of women who understood my journey without needing an explanation."

Alejandra R., Community Leader

"The Latina Foundation gave me permission to dream bigger, lead louder, and rest without guilt."

Carmen L., Member

Join a community that sees you, supports you, and grows with you every step of the way.
